+# Robust extraction

+def extract_action_idx(raw):

+    if isinstance(raw, (tuple, list)):

+        return int(raw[0])

+    elif isinstance(raw, np.ndarray):

+        if raw.size == 1:

+            return int(raw.item())

+        else:

+            return int(raw.flat[0])  # first element

+    else:

+        return int(raw)

+

+action_idx = extract_action_idx(action_raw)

+print("Extracted action_idx=", action_idx)

+
